fields.name: opening_crawl
sample_values:
It is a period of civil war.
Rebel spaceships, striking
from a hidden base, have won
their first victory against
the evil Galactic Empire.

During the battle, Rebel
spies managed to steal secret
plans to the Empire's
ultimate weapon, the DEATH
STAR, an armored space
station with enough power
to destroy an entire planet.

Pursued by the Empire's
sinister agents, Princess
Leia races home aboard her
starship, custodian of the
stolen plans that can save her
people and restore
freedom to the galaxy....

It is a dark time for the
Rebellion. Although the Death
Star has been destroyed,
Imperial troops have driven the
Rebel forces from their hidden
base and pursued them across
the galaxy.

Evading the dreaded Imperial
Starfleet, a group of freedom
fighters led by Luke Skywalker
has established a new secret
base on the remote ice world
of Hoth.

The evil lord Darth Vader,
obsessed with finding young
Skywalker, has dispatched
thousands of remote probes into
the far reaches of space....

Luke Skywalker has returned to
his home planet of Tatooine in
an attempt to rescue his
friend Han Solo from the
clutches of the vile gangster
Jabba the Hutt.

Little does Luke know that the
GALACTIC EMPIRE has secretly
begun construction on a new
armored space station even
more powerful than the first
dreaded Death Star.

When completed, this ultimate
weapon will spell certain doom
for the small band of rebels
struggling to restore freedom
to the galaxy...

fields.name: producer
sample_values: Howard G. Kazanjian, George Lucas, Rick McCallum

fields.name: eye_colors
sample_values: brown, blue, green, hazel, grey, amber
blue, green, yellow, brown, golden, red

transforms.name: flatten_people
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.people (
    name VARCHAR,
    height BIGINT,
    mass BIGINT,
    hair_color VARCHAR,
    skin_color VARCHAR,
    eye_color VARCHAR,
    birth_year VARCHAR,
    gender VARCHAR,
    homeworld VARCHAR,
    films JSON,
    species JSON,
    vehicles JSON,
    starships JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.people
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') AS name,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.height') AS BIGINT) AS height,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.mass') AS BIGINT) AS mass,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.hair_color') AS hair_color,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.skin_color') AS skin_color,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.eye_color') AS eye_color,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.birth_year') AS birth_year,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.gender') AS gender,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.homeworld') AS homeworld,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.films') AS films,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.species') AS species,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.vehicles') AS vehicles,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.starships') AS starships,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.people
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') IS NOT NULL;

transforms.name: flatten_planets
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.planets (
    name VARCHAR,
    rotation_period BIGINT,
    orbital_period BIGINT,
    diameter BIGINT,
    climate VARCHAR,
    gravity VARCHAR,
    terrain VARCHAR,
    surface_water VARCHAR,
    population VARCHAR,
    residents JSON,
    films JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.planets
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') AS name,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.rotation_period') AS BIGINT) AS rotation_period,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.orbital_period') AS BIGINT) AS orbital_period,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.diameter') AS BIGINT) AS diameter,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.climate') AS climate,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.gravity') AS gravity,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.terrain') AS terrain,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.surface_water') AS surface_water,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.population') AS population,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.residents') AS residents,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.films') AS films,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.planets
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') IS NOT NULL;

transforms.name: flatten_starships
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.starships (
    name VARCHAR,
    model VARCHAR,
    manufacturer VARCHAR,
    cost_in_credits VARCHAR,
    length VARCHAR,
    max_atmosphering_speed VARCHAR,
    crew VARCHAR,
    passengers VARCHAR,
    cargo_capacity BIGINT,
    consumables VARCHAR,
    hyperdrive_rating DOUBLE,
    MGLT BIGINT,
    starship_class VARCHAR,
    pilots JSON,
    films JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.starships
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') AS name,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.model') AS model,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.manufacturer') AS manufacturer,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.cost_in_credits') AS cost_in_credits,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.length') AS length,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.max_atmosphering_speed') AS max_atmosphering_speed,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.crew') AS crew,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.passengers') AS passengers,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.cargo_capacity') AS BIGINT) AS cargo_capacity,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.consumables') AS consumables,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.hyperdrive_rating') AS DOUBLE) AS hyperdrive_rating,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.MGLT') AS BIGINT) AS MGLT,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.starship_class') AS starship_class,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.pilots') AS pilots,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.films') AS films,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.starships
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') IS NOT NULL;

transforms.name: flatten_films
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.films (
    title VARCHAR,
    episode_id BIGINT,
    opening_crawl VARCHAR,
    director VARCHAR,
    producer VARCHAR,
    release_date TIMESTAMP,
    characters JSON,
    planets JSON,
    starships JSON,
    vehicles JSON,
    species JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.films
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.title') AS title,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.episode_id') AS BIGINT) AS episode_id,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.opening_crawl') AS opening_crawl,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.director') AS director,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.producer') AS producer,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.release_date') AS TIMESTAMP) AS release_date,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.characters') AS characters,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.planets') AS planets,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.starships') AS starships,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.vehicles') AS vehicles,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.species') AS species,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.films
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') IS NOT NULL;

transforms.name: flatten_vehicles
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.vehicles (
    name VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,
    model VARCHAR,
    manufacturer VARCHAR,
    cost_in_credits VARCHAR,
    length DOUBLE,
    max_atmosphering_speed BIGINT,
    crew BIGINT,
    passengers BIGINT,
    cargo_capacity VARCHAR,
    consumables VARCHAR,
    vehicle_class VARCHAR,
    pilots JSON,
    films JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.vehicles
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') AS name,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.model') AS model,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.manufacturer') AS manufacturer,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.cost_in_credits') AS cost_in_credits,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.length') AS DOUBLE) AS length,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.max_atmosphering_speed') AS BIGINT) AS max_atmosphering_speed,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.crew') AS BIGINT) AS crew,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.passengers') AS BIGINT) AS passengers,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.cargo_capacity') AS cargo_capacity,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.consumables') AS consumables,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.vehicle_class') AS vehicle_class,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.pilots') AS pilots,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.films') AS films,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.vehicles
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') IS NOT NULL;

transforms.name: flatten_species
transforms.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS silver.species (
    name VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,
    classification VARCHAR,
    designation VARCHAR,
    average_height VARCHAR,
    skin_colors VARCHAR,
    hair_colors VARCHAR,
    eye_colors VARCHAR,
    average_lifespan VARCHAR,
    homeworld VARCHAR,
    language VARCHAR,
    people JSON,
    films JSON,
    created TIMESTAMP,
    edited TIMESTAMP,
    url VARCHAR
);

INSERT OR REPLACE INTO silver.species
SELECT
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') AS name,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.classification') AS classification,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.designation') AS designation,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.average_height') AS average_height,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.skin_colors') AS skin_colors,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.hair_colors') AS hair_colors,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.eye_colors') AS eye_colors,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.average_lifespan') AS average_lifespan,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.homeworld') AS homeworld,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.language') AS language,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.people') AS people,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.films') AS films,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.created') AS TIMESTAMP) AS created,
    TRY_CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.edited') AS TIMESTAMP) AS edited,
    json_extract_string(payload, '$.url') AS url
FROM bronze.species
WHERE json_extract_string(payload, '$.name') IS NOT NULL;
